name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-27
title: Retire/delete obsolete scripts: dispatch-feature-edit.py, workspace-map.py, rabbit-workspace-map skill, check-no-main-edits.py, check-opus-for-planning-agents.py
description:
Cleanup of dead/orphan/intentionally-retired items in contract:

DELETE entirely:
- scripts/dispatch-feature-edit.py — zero runtime callers (only mentioned in an error string and a SKILL.md deprecation criterion); superseded by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py via rabbit-feature-touch
- scripts/workspace-map.py — orphan since rabbit-workspace-map skill was retired
- skills/rabbit-workspace-map/ — already marked [RETIRED]; remove entirely
- scripts/enforcement/check-no-main-edits.py — never auto-invoked; workflow naturally prevents main edits (feature-touch creates branch, TDD works on it, PR back; operator self-checks); retire
- scripts/enforcement/check-opus-for-planning-agents.py — never auto-invoked; model-choice enforcement at agent definition level is fragile; retire

Update build-contract.json to remove the rabbit-workspace-map skill copy-file entry.
Update spec.md to remove invariants tied to deleted scripts.
Update workspace-structure.json to remove retired skill from any declarations.
